items.text: Civic Wire: leaked budget notes dominate the office corridor.
Public attention turns a quiet accounting problem into a visible reform test.
Civic Wire: volunteer canvassers report a reform surge.
The office has enough field support to turn a poll shock into mandate pressure.
Civic Wire: council deadlock hardens into a public fight.
Opposition pressure is high enough that every route now carries visible cost.
Civic Wire: reform week reshapes the monthly docket.
No emergency has taken over the month, so the office can choose its next preparation.
This root scene initializes the demo state and then hands the player to
repeatable card surfaces. The longer tour now lives on the Office Overview Card,
so it can be opened again from the workspace hand.
Try the simplified SDAAH-like loop: open the hand, use a monthly action card,
let the month advance, then read the docket and events that appear.
